meaning: n.配偶,对手,助手vt.使配对,使一致,结伴vi.成配偶,紧密配合
examples: He has found his ideal mate.
This allows the pair to mate properly and stops the hen from staying in the nest.
He's been foragin' for his mate.
And I believe had McCain picked a more qualified running mate, he would've had a better chance.
In fact, Senator McCain was asked if he would consider Lieberman as a possible running mate.
